text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Hoo boy, I'm lookin' forward to this! The Kikuka
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
And this time, there's gonna be a Mejiro family
showdown, right?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I hope you brought a fan, 'cause this
race is gonna get heated!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
They're quite excited... I can hear them all the
way from here.
choice_data_list: That's because it's a Triple Crown race.
That's because it's a Triple Crown race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. An opportunity coveted by any and all
Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Beyond that, for me, it is a chance to truly
compete against Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's strange. Long before this, the two of us would
race against each other, but there were no
spectators back then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Now, all eyes are on us...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure everyone in the Mejiro family is watching
us as well.
choice_data_list: You'll have to run with dignity, then!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Even if my opponent is Ryan—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: No. Especially because my opponent is Ryan, someone whom I respect, I must gain a victory most magnificent!
